items.question: Which theme asks whether we can understand internal model computations?
items.explanation: Interpretability research examines how models represent and compute information.

items.question: Where should you find the authoritative list of Anthropic papers?
items.explanation: Official research index is the primary source.

items.question: Constitutional AI research most directly informs which Claude concern?
options: Harmlessness and principle-guided behavior during training
items.answer: Harmlessness and principle-guided behavior during training
items.explanation: Constitutional AI is a flagship alignment thread shaping refusal and tone defaults.

items.question: Scalable oversight research primarily addresses:
options: How to supervise capable models when tasks exceed unaided human review bandwidth
How to eliminate all human reviewers forever
How to print research PDFs faster
items.answer: How to supervise capable models when tasks exceed unaided human review bandwidth
items.explanation: Oversight research asks how humans or weaker models can evaluate stronger systems at scale.
